MedMix is a community-reporting and educational tool, not a medical or regulatory authority. For urgent situations in the USA, call Poison Control at 1-800-222-1222, or call 911. Outside the USA, contact your local poison control center or emergency number.

      Industrial & lab chemical library

      Substance reference table

      CAS numbers, hazard categories, and known-hazard counts for every chemical in the connection network, sourced conceptually from CAMEO Chemicals (NOAA), CDC/NIOSH, OSHA, NFPA 491, NLM HSDB, EPA, IARC, and WHO public hazard classifications.

      Catalogued connections

      Chemical & medication connection network

      Every verified substance pair in the database, visualized as a network — color reflects the verdict: green = safe, amber = caution, red = dangerous.

      Policies

      Privacy & terms

      What this platform is

      MedMix is a community-reporting and educational tool. It is not a diagnostic, regulatory, or medical authority, and it does not replace professional medical advice, Poison Control, or emergency services. In the USA, Poison Control can be reached at 1-800-222-1222, available 24/7.

      What data we collect

      Submissions to Counterfeit Watch and the Signal Board are anonymous by default. We do not require names, emails, or other identifying information to submit a report. Country-level location is used only to power the Global Risk Map.

      How data is used

      Aggregate, anonymized data may be shared publicly through the Impact Dashboard and Global Risk Map to support public health awareness. Individual reports are not sold or shared with third parties for commercial purposes.

      Accuracy & limitations

      Community-submitted reports are unverified at the time of posting. The Verified Reference Database is separately curated from cited public sources and clearly distinguished from user submissions throughout the platform.

      Emergency situations

      If you believe you or someone else has been exposed to a dangerous chemical combination or counterfeit medication, call Poison Control immediately. In the USA: 1-800-222-1222 (24/7, free, confidential). Outside the USA, contact your local poison control center or emergency number. Do not rely on this platform for time-sensitive medical decisions.

      Membership

      Join the network

      Free, anonymous-friendly. Required to submit reports — this is what powers the live metrics.

      Scroll to zoom, drag to pan. Ball-and-stick style — simplified for clarity, not to exact scale.
